# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: docker-builder
spec:
  containers:
  - name: docker-builder
    image: your-docker-image
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-socket
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
  volumes:
  - name: docker-socket
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
      type: Socket
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: docker-builder
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: docker-builder
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: docker-builder
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: image-builder
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: image-builder
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods", "secrets"]
  verbs: ["create", "delete", "get", "list", "patch", "update"]
- apiGroups: ["apps"]
  resources: ["deployments"]
  verbs: ["create", "delete", "get", "list", "patch", "update"]
- apiGroups: ["build.openshift.io"]
  resources: ["buildconfigs", "buildconfigruns"]
  verbs: ["create", "delete", "get", "list", "patch", "update"]
